welcome.title: SciPen Studio
welcome.subtitle: Local Research, Cloud Intelligence

settings.title: Settings
settings.agentRuntimeSnacaDesc: Embeds a snaca-editor subprocess. Requires SNACA_API_KEY env.
settings.agentRuntimeBuiltinDesc: Calls the AI service directly (completion-only path).

overleaf.title: Overleaf
overleaf.conflictQuestion:
"{{fileName}}" was modified on both local and Overleaf.

Keep local version and overwrite Overleaf?

aiSettings.chatProviderDesc: Used by the SNACA Agent for chat, tool calls, Diff review, and Ctrl+K inline completion
aiSettings.chatModelDesc: Pick a stronger reasoning model, e.g. deepseek-chat, claude-sonnet-4
aiSettings.providerDesc: Select the model provider for AI
aiSettings.baseUrlDesc: API endpoint URL, leave empty for default
aiSettings.modelDesc: Model ID for Ctrl+K inline completion (low-latency models recommended, e.g. gpt-4o-mini); leave blank to reuse the Agent model

compiler.title: LaTeX Compilation Settings
compiler.remoteProject: Currently a remote project (Overleaf), using remote compilation
compiler.localProject: Currently a local project, using local compilation
compiler.engineDesc: Use XeLaTeX or LuaLaTeX for Chinese documents
compiler.noProjectHint: Please open a project first, compilation settings will adjust automatically based on project type:
compiler.localProjectOptions: Local project: Choose from XeLaTeX, LuaLaTeX, pdfLaTeX, Tectonic
compiler.remoteProjectOptions: Remote project (Overleaf): Use Overleaf remote compilation

overleaf.title: Overleaf Remote Compilation
overleaf.desc: Use Overleaf server for remote compilation, supports SyncTeX bidirectional sync
overleaf.serverUrlDesc: Supports official server or private deployment
overleaf.cookiesDesc: Copy from browser Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies
overleaf.step1: Login to Overleaf in browser and open project
overleaf.step2: Press F12 to open Developer Tools

compiler.texliveEndpointDesc: URL for on-demand TeX package fetching during WASM compilation. Leave empty for default. Use http://your-host:5001/ for self-hosted.
compiler.typstEngineDesc: Select the compiler backend used for Typst PDF generation
compiler.syncTexLocalSupport: pdfLaTeX, XeLaTeX, LuaLaTeX, and Tectonic support SyncTeX.
compiler.syncTexWasmSupport: LaTeX WASM engines have session-scoped SyncTeX support.
compiler.syncTexTypstSupport: Typst compilers currently do not support SyncTeX.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Click on a shortcut and press a new key combination to modify

selectionSettings.title: Selection Assistant
selectionSettings.subtitle: Review captured text from any application
selectionSettings.enableSelectionDesc: When enabled, use a shortcut or global selection popup to inspect captured text
selectionSettings.triggerShortcutDesc: After selecting text in any app, press this shortcut to open the selection window
selectionSettings.triggerModeDesc: Shortcut trigger is more stable, global selection provides smoother experience
selectionSettings.platformNotSupported: Current platform does not support global selection hook (Windows/macOS only)
selectionSettings.step3: Review the captured text and continue in SciPen if needed

logPanel.title: Log
logPanel.noLogs: No logs yet, compile document to see logs here

commandPalette.compileDocDesc: Compile current LaTeX document to PDF

settingsPanel.title: Settings Panel
settingsPanel.description: These changes apply to the current workspace immediately.

summaries.selection: Configure selection assistant and shortcut trigger mode.
summaries.ai: Configure provider, API key, and models for the AI Agent and inline completion.

summaries.update: Check for and install application updates.

preview.noPreview: No preview available for this file type

preview.typstCompileToPreview: Save or compile the Typst document to generate a PDF preview.

markdownRender.scrollHint: Scroll horizontally to see full code

chatError.llmRateLimited: Upstream AI service rate-limited; retry shortly
chatError.llmContextOverflow: Context too long even after compaction
chatError.notInitialized: Agent sidecar is not ready yet

agentStatus.usageHint: Cumulative tokens / estimated cost for this conversation

settingsAgent.viewerDesc: Inspect Agent memory and the skills currently loaded for this project. Both feed the AI's long-term context and capabilities.
settingsAgent.memoryDesc: Project-scoped long-term memory: user prefs, project conventions, references, and feedback corrections.
settingsAgent.skillsDesc: Project- and tenant-scoped skill library. Edit the .md files in your editor.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.desc: Configure Model Context Protocol servers so the LLM can call external tools (filesystem, databases, APIs, ...). Tools land as mcp__<server>__<tool> and auto-register with the Agent.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.nameDuplicate: Duplicate name; SNACA will keep the first and drop the rest
mcp.commandDesc: Executable or PATH-resolvable command (npx / uvx / python / ...).
mcp.urlDesc: Remote Streamable HTTP endpoint of the MCP server.
mcp.restartHint: ⚠ MCP config changes restart the sidecar; the active session resumes automatically.

approval.title: Approval mode
approval.desc: Controls how SNACA asks before file mutations / shell tools run.
approval.modeDesc: Takes effect on the next turn — no session restart needed.

engine.title: Engine advanced
engine.desc: Override SNACA engine defaults. Leave blank to keep the model-aware default. Changes restart the sidecar.
engine.maxIterationsDesc: Max LLM iterations per turn — prevents runaway loops.
engine.loopGuardDesc: Abort after N consecutive identical tool-call patterns (anti-loop heuristic).
engine.historyLimitDesc: Cap on history messages injected per turn.
engine.concurrentToolsDesc: Max concurrent tool calls within one turn.
engine.compactAfterDesc: Trigger auto-compaction once input tokens cross this threshold.
engine.compactSummaryMaxTokensDesc: Cap on the summariser LLM's output during compaction (default 2048).
engine.historyMaxBytesDesc: Hard byte cap on assembled history (default ~1.5MB).
engine.turnTimeoutSecsDesc: Wall-clock cap per turn in seconds. 0 disables.
engine.collapseToolResultsThresholdDesc: Collapse historical read-only tool results larger than N bytes. 0 disables.
engine.maxOutputTokenEscalationAttemptsDesc: Retries when the LLM hits max_tokens mid-stream. 0 disables escalation.
engine.maxOutputTokenCeilingDesc: Upper bound for the escalation loop's max_tokens (default 32768).
engine.streamToolExecutionDesc: Stream tool execution output back to the UI.
engine.mcpIdleTtlSecsDesc: Seconds before an idle MCP subprocess is reclaimed. 0 = keep alive forever.
engine.mcpReaperPeriodSecsDesc: How often the reaper sweeps idle MCP subprocesses (seconds). 0 disables sweeping.

memoryViewer.title: Memory & Skills
memoryViewer.noActiveSession: Not connected to a project. Open a project first.
memoryViewer.previewPlaceholder: Select an entry on the left to view
